'''Meris II''' was the second [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Meris system]] of the [[Elrood sector/Legends|Elrood sector]].

A [[Temperature/Legends|hot]] [[Jungle/Legends|jungle]] world, Meris II was home to primitive, heat-resistant life forms—some corporations investigated the possibility of genetically engineering these bacteria to produce molecules that could be incorporated into heat shielding. It was believed the bacteria could be used for commercial uses, though no specific products were marketed.
